rag_rules: Repair AGREE boolean-type mismatches by ensuring expressions evaluate to bool, not int
Do not use subcomponent paths in component type annexes; restrict to visible features
generic_rules: Use only visible AADL features or locally declared eq/const helpers in AGREE expressions
Implementation-level bindings belong in implementation annexes, not type annexes
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE scalar types: int, real, bool — never integer or boolean
assign statements must target valid outputs or declared auxiliary variables
anti_patterns: Using integer-valued expressions where boolean is required in assume/guarantee
Referencing subcomponent ports directly in component type annex contracts
